query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'projects' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE 'developer%' ORDER BY COLUMN_NAME;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'projects' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE 'developer%' ORDER BY COLUMN_NAME;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
developerFeePct	decimal
developerFeePhase1Pct	decimal
developerFeePhase2Pct	decimal
developerNocFee	decimal
